name: Recursive Ancestral Terrains
description: A fractal landscape where different ancestral 'lineages' of terrain rules coexist. Moving the mouse selects which generational traits are expressed in different regions, revealing the evolutionary history of the land.

params.name: Lineage Blend
params.description: How strongly different ancestral traits mix

params.name: Mutation Rate
params.description: How much audio influences variation between generations

params.name: Historical Depth
params.description: How visible the 'memory' of previous generations is
